title: Bug Hotel Observer
description: A quiet bug hotel journal where kids stamp tiny guests, simple behaviors, and gentle observation habits.
learningGoals: Practice patient observation of small living things
Build vocabulary for common bug guests and behaviors
Reinforce gentle, slow looking around insects and other tiny creatures
interactionModel: observe-journal tap stickers to record bug guests and actions
feedbackModel: Every sticker is accepted with pop and sparkle SFX plus a gentle bug fact; the recap reads the bug hotel notes back.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
